==Card Redemption==
Throughout [[Hellas]], cards can be collected and exchanged for various rewards. Cards vary from tier 1 (white) to tier 5 (orange) and there's different types of each tier. Below is a list of the rewards that can be exchanged, and how many times.

==Tier 1 (White)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:White Olive Branch.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Olive Branch
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +16<br>Snail Rush +16
| rowspan="7" | 17 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Hellenic INTEL +1,500
|-
|3x1||2,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|white|Exploration|Javelin}}
|-
|6x1||{{Gearlink|white|Exploration|Bronze Helmet}}
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:Natural Sponge.png|75px]]
|Natural Sponge||3x1||300 W-tads||200 B-tads
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:Anisette.png|75px]]
|Anisette||4x1||4,000 B-tads||Hellenic INTEL +330
|-
| style="background-color:var(--white-bg)" | [[File:Sparta.png|75px]]
|Sparta||4x1||Gear Chest +40||Souvlaki +1
|}

==Tier 2 (Green)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Green Olive Branch.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Olive Branch
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +160<br>Snail DEF +16
| rowspan="7" | 51 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Hellenic INTEL +3,000
|-
|3x1||4,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +5
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|green|Exploration|Heavy Infantry Helmet}}
|-
|6x1||Evolution Chest +40
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Song of Siren.png|75px]]
|Song of Siren||3x1||6,000 B-tads
|Offering Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Monk Seal.png|75px]]
|Monk Seal||4x1||<span style="color:#22d3d0;">Reagent</span> +100
|Evolution Chest +1
|-
| style="background-color:var(--green-bg)" | [[File:Aegean Sea.png|75px]]
|Hellenic Desert||3x2||Demon Cells +800||350 B-tads
|}

==Tier 3 (Blue)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection, Gear
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Blue Olive Branch.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" |Olive Branch
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail DEF +18<br>Snail RUSH +18
| rowspan="7" | 153 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Hellenic INTEL +4,500
|-
|3x1||6,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Novice Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||{{Gearlink|blue|Exploration|Spartan Shield}}
|-
|6x1||Evolution Chest +60
|-
|7x1||Lottery Ticket +2
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Olympic Game.png|75px]]
|Olympic Game||4x1||400 W-tads
|10 W-tads
|-
| style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)" | [[File:Parthenon.png|75px]]
|Parthenon||3x2||Offering Speedup +4h
|Angel Cells +100
|}

==Tier 4 (Purple)==
'''Recommended:'''  Enhancement Injection
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="7" style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" | [[File:Purple Olive Branch.png|75px]]
| rowspan="7" | Olive Branch
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail HP +200<br>Snail ATK +20
| rowspan="7" | 459 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Hellenic INTEL +6,000
|-
|3x1||8,000 B-tads
|-
|4x1||Expert Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||Gear Chest +80
|-
|6x1||Evolution Chest +80
|-
|7x2||Lottery Ticket +3
|-
| style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" | [[File:Santorini.png|75px]]
|Santorini||3x1||Travel Speedup +2h
|Clone Speedup +5m
|-
| style="background-color:var(--purple-bg)" |[[File:Acropolis.png|75px]]
|Acropolis||4x1||Hellenic Treasure Map +50
|Hellenic Treasure Map +2
|}

==Tier 5 (Orange)==
'''Recommended:''' Enhancement Injections
{| class="wikitable"
!Image!!Name!!CostxQuantity!!Reward!!Conversion
|-
| rowspan="6" style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" | [[File:Orange Olive Branch.png|75px]]
| rowspan="6" | Olive Branch
|3x3||Enhancement Injection<br>Snail ATK +22<br>Snail DEF +22
| rowspan="6" | 1,377 B-tads
|-
|2x1||Hellenic INTEL +8,000
|-
|3x1||12k B-tads
|-
|4x1||Master Scroll +10
|-
|5x1||Evolution Chest +100
|-
|6x2||Lottery Ticket +3
|-
| style="background-color:var(--orange-bg)" | [[File:Colossus of Rhodes.png|75px]]
|Colossus of Rhodes||3x1||Divine Order Chest +100
|15 W-tads
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Hellas]]
